description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with a complex, multi-sectioned roof in shades of terracotta and gray. The front facade is defined by a gated entry, a low perimeter wall, and a covered porch supported by columns. The exterior walls are finished in a warm, peach-toned stucco, complemented by white-framed windows and decorative fencing. The roofline is a combination of gable and hip forms, creating visual interest and multiple roof heights. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in sets and others spaced individually. The property includes a driveway and a garage area, suggesting ample space for vehicles and outdoor activities.
description: A large, single-story house with a complex terracotta and gray roof, peach stucco walls, and a gated front entry with a covered porch. The design features multiple roof sections, white-framed windows, and a perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entry, covered porch with columns, and main facade with several windows and decorative fencing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, low profile of the house, the extended roof sections, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the intersecting rooflines, additional windows, and the back perimeter wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garage area, driveway, and the extended covered porch structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with grouped and individual windows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a covered porch, columns, and decorative fencing
